items.key: (@@admin = 1 or exists(select 1 from sysunitrights r where r.user_id = @@userID and r.ma_dvcs = hrrmdot.ma_dvcs and r.r_access=1)) and status = '1'
items.check: (@@admin = 1 or exists(select 1 from sysunitrights r where r.user_id = @@userID and r.ma_dvcs = hrrmdot.ma_dvcs and r.r_access=1))

footer.v: 0 - Chưa tuyển dụng, 1 - Đã tuyển dụng, * - Tất cả
